title: Unit Graph — Manifest Fragment Schema (v1)
description: Validates the manifest fields written by factory_graph.py after unit-decomposer completes. Used by factory_validate.py when manifest.unit_waves is present.

unit_waves.description: Topologically-sorted waves of unit names. Wave 0 has no dependencies; wave N depends only on units in waves 0..N-1.

items.description: A single wave — units in this array can be spawned in parallel.
Unit name as declared in unit-decomposer output.

unit_max_parallelism.description: Largest wave size — the peak number of parallel code-generator spawns required.
